org.jscience.natural.biology.genetics
Biological modeling, genetics, and life science simulations.

    Description
    static PopulationGenetics.AlleleFrequencies
    PopulationGenetics.estimateAlleles(PopulationGenetics.GenotypeFrequencies observed)
    Estimates allele frequencies from observed genotypes using maximum likelihood.
